zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Mautravers於1345年出生在英國多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯時，她的父親Sir John Mautravers VII29歲，母親Gwenthlian Talbot24歲。她於1380年8月10日與Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham在英國英格蘭素瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1404年1月10日在英國素可享年59歲，埋葬在英國素可列維斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Mautravers于1345年出生在英国多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯时，她的父亲Sir John Mautravers VII29岁，母亲Gwenthlian Talbot24岁。她于1380年8月10日与Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham在英国英格兰素瑞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1404年1月10日在英国素可享年59岁，埋葬在英国素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Mautravers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Matravers
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Mautravert in Chérencé-le-Héron (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Mautravers was born in 1345, in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, her father, Sir John Mautravers VII, was 29 and her mother, Gwenthlian Talbot, was 24. She married Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham on 10 August 1380, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 10 January 1404, in Sussex, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Mautravers est née en 1345, à Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Mautravers VII, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Gwenthlian Talbot, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham le 10 août 1380, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1404, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England: Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Mautravers 1345 in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Mautravers VII 29 und ihre Mutter Gwenthlian Talbot 24. Sie hat am 10. August 1380 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1404 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Sussex, England und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Mautravers è nata il nel 1345 nel Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, sua padre, Sir John Mautravers VII, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Gwenthlian Talbot, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham il 10 agosto 1380, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 gennaio 1404, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Lewes, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Mautraversが1345年にイギリスドールセトリトチェット マトラバーズで生まれた時，父Sir John Mautravers VIIは29歳，母Gwenthlian Talbotは24歳であった。1380年8月10日にイギリスイギリススリーでReginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1404年1月10日にイギリススセックスで59歳で死去し，イギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Mautravers(이)가 1345년 영국 도르세트 리트쳇 마트레이버스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Mautravers VII(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenthlian Talbot(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1380년 8월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1404년 1월 10일 영국 수세스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England: Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Mautravers nasceu em 1345, em Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Mautravers VII, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Gwenthlian Talbot, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham em 10 de agosto de 1380, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1404, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ro.Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England: Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Mautravers родилась в 1345 г. в местности личетт матравирс, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Mautravers VII было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenthlian Talbot, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham 10 августа 1380 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 января 1404 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham el 10 de agosto de 1380, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de enero de 1404, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra.
